title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Orochi Forces, Orochi, Unknown person #13, Yasuie, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Orochi Forces
dialogue.text: Why are they heading for rasetsu town?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's to be cremated at the prison house as a criminal.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look! They're showing the front doors of the prison house!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would they do such a thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It appears tonyasu was the thief.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Whaddaya mean?! That doesn't make any sense!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I remember now. With that hair...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fact that he's the thief matters very little.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuieie! A Daimyo of Wano, who once served the Kozuki clan alongside Lord Oden!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Daimyo of Hakumai, Yasuie the hedge- hog!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was incredibly strict! I barely recognize him now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuieie! I can't believe you're still alive!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WaHahaha! I see I haven't yet been forgotten...

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: OROCHI WILL NEVER LET ME LIVE!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are two things I'd like to apologize to everyone for!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And one thing I need to say to that idiot Orochi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna go into the night, smiling all the way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Chaos! What will he speak of?!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
